/usr/bin/g++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g CMakeFiles/HospManagerSyst.dir/HospManagerSyst_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HospManagerSyst.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HospManagerSyst.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HospManagerSyst.dir/doctor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HospManagerSyst.dir/patient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HospManagerSyst.dir/hospmanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HospManagerSyst.dir/appoitment.cpp.o -o HospManagerSyst  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
